apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Dropbox Sign API key from Settings > API. Sent as HTTP Basic username for all requests.

restBase.title: REST Base URI
restBase.description: Dropbox Sign REST base. Defaults to https://api.hellosign.com/v3.

testMode.title: Test Mode
testMode.description: When true, signature requests are created as non-billable test requests.

connectHmacKey.title: Callback HMAC Key
connectHmacKey.description: Optional secret for verifying inbound event callbacks. Dropbox Sign signs callbacks with the API key by default; set this only if you use a distinct callback secret. Inbound webhooks are rejected when verification fails.
